entity.summary: Vietnam-based cryptocurrency exchange and direct-swap platform providing crypto-to-crypto and crypto-to-VND conversion, bank-transfer and cash settlement options, staking, and wallet-directed swaps across a broad asset set.
entity.notes: Current first-party BitcoinVN website exposes an active swap application across many crypto assets and VND settlement methods and states that the business was founded in 2013 and has operated without interruption since 2014. Launch date remains null because this review did not reconcile the company-founding year with a precise exchange-service launch marker.

evidence.title: BitcoinVN official exchange and swap platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes an active multi-asset swap interface, crypto-to-VND routes, bank-transfer and cash settlement methods, staking navigation, account access, and current service activity.

evidence.title: BitcoinVN company history and continuity statement
evidence.notes: First-party homepage states that BitcoinVN was founded in 2013 and has operated without interruption since 2014, supporting long-running Vietnam exchange identity while HEI leaves exact launch_date unset.

evidence.title: BitcoinVN exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies BitcoinVN as an exchange venue; first-party current service evidence is used for active classification.
